infobox.value: (94.5 [MHz](/wiki/Hertz "Hertz") "Kiss-FM") is a [commercial](/wiki/Commercial_radio "Commercial radio") [FM](/wiki/FM_radio "FM radio") radio station [licensed](/wiki/City_of_license "City of license") to [Ellsworth, Maine](/wiki/Ellsworth,_Maine "Ellsworth, Maine"), and serving the [Bangor metropolitan area](/wiki/Bangor,_Maine "Bangor, Maine"). The station broadcasts a [hot adult contemporary](/wiki/Hot_adult_contemporary "Hot adult contemporary") radio format, switching to [Christmas music](/wiki/Christmas_music "Christmas music") for part of November and December. WKSQ is owned by Blueberry Broadcasting.[[3]](#cite_note-3)

(97.5 FM) in [Madison](/wiki/Madison,_Maine "Madison, Maine"), which was formerly part of [Fox Sports Maine](/wiki/Fox_Sports_Maine "Fox Sports Maine"). In the [Mid Coast](/wiki/Mid_Coast "Mid Coast") area, WKSQ is simulcast on [WQSS](/wiki/WQSS "WQSS") (102.5 FM) in [Camden](/wiki/Camden,_Maine "Camden, Maine"), which formerly offered its own [adult contemporary](/wiki/Adult_contemporary "Adult contemporary") format.[[4]](#cite_note-ri-wksqtrimulcast-4)[[5]](#cite_note-pbp-wksqonwqss-5)

["WKSQ Facility Record"](https://www.fcc.gov/fcc-bin/fmq?call=WKSQ). *United States [Federal Communications Commission](/wiki/Federal_Communications_Commission "Federal Communications Commission"), audio division*.

**WKSQ** (94.5 [MHz](/wiki/Hertz "Hertz") "Kiss-FM") is a [commercial](/wiki/Commercial_radio "Commercial radio") [FM](/wiki/FM_radio "FM radio") radio station [licensed](/wiki/City_of_license "City of license") to [Ellsworth, Maine](/wiki/Ellsworth,_Maine "Ellsworth, Maine"), and serving the [Bangor metropolitan area](/wiki/Bangor,_Maine "Bangor, Maine"). The station broadcasts a [hot adult contemporary](/wiki/Hot_adult_contemporary "Hot adult contemporary") radio format, switching to [Christmas music](/wiki/Christmas_music "Christmas music") for part of November and December. WKSQ is owned by Blueberry Broadcasting.[[3]](#cite_note-3)

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/d/dd/Kiss-FM_logo.png/250px-Kiss-FM_logo.png)](/wiki/File:Kiss-FM_logo.png)

Former logo used from February 24, 2014, through August 31, 2018

Programming is [simulcast](/wiki/Simulcast "Simulcast") in the [Skowhegan](/wiki/Skowhegan,_Maine "Skowhegan, Maine") / [Farmington](/wiki/Farmington,_Maine "Farmington, Maine") areas on **WQSK** (97.5 FM) in [Madison](/wiki/Madison,_Maine "Madison, Maine"), which was formerly part of [Fox Sports Maine](/wiki/Fox_Sports_Maine "Fox Sports Maine"). In the [Mid Coast](/wiki/Mid_Coast "Mid Coast") area, WKSQ is simulcast on [WQSS](/wiki/WQSS "WQSS") (102.5 FM) in [Camden](/wiki/Camden,_Maine "Camden, Maine"), which formerly offered its own [adult contemporary](/wiki/Adult_contemporary "Adult contemporary") format.[[4]](#cite_note-ri-wksqtrimulcast-4)[[5]](#cite_note-pbp-wksqonwqss-5)

WKSQ used to carry [Maine Black Bears](/wiki/Maine_Black_Bears "Maine Black Bears") sports, sharing [flagship](/wiki/Flagship_(broadcasting) "Flagship (broadcasting)") status of the [Black Bear Sports Network](/wiki/Black_Bear_Sports_Network "Black Bear Sports Network") with [WAEI](/wiki/WTOS_(AM) "WTOS (AM)"); [football](/wiki/Maine_Black_Bears_football "Maine Black Bears football") and [men's hockey](/wiki/Maine_Black_Bears_men%27s_ice_hockey "Maine Black Bears men's ice hockey") games were aired on the station.[[6]](#cite_note-bdn-wksqblackbears-6) In morning [drive time](/wiki/Drive_time "Drive time"), WKSQ carries a [syndicated](/wiki/Radio_syndication "Radio syndication") program, *[Elvis Duran and the Morning Show](/wiki/Elvis_Duran_and_the_Morning_Show "Elvis Duran and the Morning Show")*.[[7]](#cite_note-7) The station's previous morning show was Mike & Mike in the Morning (a local program featuring Mike Dow and Mike Elliot, unrelated to the [similarly-named program](/wiki/Mike_%26_Mike "Mike & Mike") on [ESPN Radio](/wiki/ESPN_Radio "ESPN Radio")); previous evening programing included *[Intelligence for Your Life with John Tesh](/wiki/John_Tesh "John Tesh")*.
